message:
feat(tui): add responsive breakpoints to Events, History, Search, Triage, Help views (ft-tzo6j)

Add stacked_mode/ultra_compact breakpoint-driven layout adaptations to
the remaining operator views that lacked responsive polish, matching the
pattern already established in Home, Panes, and Timeline views.

Changes per view:
- Events: vertical stacking <96w, compact columns <68w, compact detail panel
- History: vertical stacking <96w, compact columns <68w, compact detail panel
- Search: vertical stacking for results area <96w, compact saved search rows
- Triage: responsive column widths, shorter action hints in compact mode
- Help: condensed key reference for narrow terminals <96w

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
